ham.subject: Scheduled Network Maintenance – March 10, 2026 (8:00 – 10:00 PM)
ham.body:
Dear Team,

The IT Services team will conduct a scheduled maintenance window on March 10, 2026 from 8:00 PM to 10:00 PM. During this time there may be brief interruptions to the corporate VPN, file shares, and internal web services.

Please ensure that you save all work and log off before 7:45 PM to avoid unsaved data loss. If you experience any issues afterwards, open a ticket in the ServiceNow portal or email helpdesk@corp.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
\nIT Support

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Email Account Has Been Compromised
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

Our security monitoring systems have detected unusual activity on your company email account. Immediate action is required to prevent permanent suspension.

To verify your identity and restore access, please click the link below and upload a clear photo of your government‑issued ID.

<URL>

If you do not validate your identity within the next 24 hours, your account will be locked and data deleted.

Thank you for your attention.

Security Team
